name: common_sense_f0b512b6-145e-4d6d-88cb-8ff625e65d7d
prompt: A woman is depicted walking along a scenic walkway, her back turned to the camera. She is wearing a black and white mid-thigh checkered dress with sleeveless shoulders and an A-line skirt. Her long, wavy hair cascades down her back as she moves steadily forward. The walkway is adorned with elegant black street lamps and a black metal railing with a dimly lit string of lights hanging above. The railing to the left, black in color, runs parallel to a serene body of turquoise water, casting shadows on the walkway. To her right, a brown railing with vertical balusters and intricate, arched detailing at the top is mounted on a cream-colored, raised platform that contrasts sharply with the railing’s color. As she walks, her shadow becomes visible, moving along the raised platform, adding a dynamic element to the scene and highlighting the bright natural light illuminating the area.  The setting is a vibrant urban environment with stunning modern architectural landmarks placed prominently in the background. Among these, the tallest building dominates the skyline, glistening under the bright midday sun. This skyscraper has a sleek, silver facade with a tapering design reaching high into the clear blue sky. Adjacent buildings are also modern, featuring shiny glass exteriors. The overall atmospheric mood is peaceful yet dynamic, with the juxtaposition of the tranquil water and the lively cityscape. The video maintains a tracking forward motion, depicting the woman moving centrally within the frame, emphasizing the symmetry of the architectural vista ahead captured in a wide shot from an eye-level perspective.
